summary: Iteration 22: Commission Distribution Chain Bug Fix - All 11 backend tests passed (100%). The critical bug where only User 1 received commissions in a 4-user referral chain has been verified as FIXED. Tests confirm: 1) 4-user chain (A->B->C->D) correctly distributes R$1 per level when D purchases, 2) Self-referral prevention works, 3) Deduplication in distribute_commissions prevents double credits, 4) Admin repair endpoint functional, 5) No circular referral_network entries.
passed_tests: TestCommissionChainFix::test_01_verify_referral_chain_structure - PASSED (Chain A->B->C->D correctly set up with referred_by_id)
TestCommissionChainFix::test_02_get_initial_credits_before_purchase - PASSED (Initial credits recorded for A, B, C)
TestCommissionChainFix::test_04_verify_commission_distribution_all_3_levels - PASSED (A, B, C each received R$3 commission)
TestCommissionChainFix::test_05_verify_user_d_did_not_receive_commission - PASSED (Purchaser D did not receive self-commission)
TestNetworkEndpointVerification::test_network_shows_correct_levels - PASSED (/api/network shows correct level 1 and level 2 referrals)

server.py.lines_340-392: process_referral() - Self-referral guard (line 351) and seen_parents set to prevent duplicate network entries
server.py.lines_394-437: distribute_commissions() - credited_parents set prevents double commission to same user, skips purchaser self-commission
server.py.lines_2914-3023: POST /api/admin/repair-referrals - Removes self-referrals, circular entries, duplicates, and rebuilds missing network entries

bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Self-referral (User 1 referred themselves) caused duplicate entries in referral_network, breaking commission distribution
fix_applied: Guard against self-referral in process_referral (line 351: if referrer['user_id'] == new_user_id: return)
Deduplication in distribute_commissions via credited_parents set (line 402-414)
Admin repair endpoint to clean up existing bad data
Data cleanup executed via repair endpoint
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: CONFIRMED FIXED - All 3 levels (A, B, C) correctly received R$3 each when D purchased 3 packages

critical_code_review_comments: Commission distribution fix is correctly implemented with both prevention (process_referral guard) and deduplication (credited_parents set)
Admin repair endpoint properly handles all edge cases: self-referrals, circular entries, duplicates, and missing entries
Legacy purchase flow with 'packages' field maintains backward compatibility

test_credentials.test_chain_users: Created dynamically with prefix CHAIN22_* for each test run

seed_data_creation: Test creates 4 users in chain (A->B->C->D) dynamically for commission testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 complete. Commission distribution chain bug fix verified. The fix ensures: 1) Self-referral is blocked in process_referral, 2) Deduplication via credited_parents set in distribute_commissions, 3) Admin repair endpoint cleans up bad data. All 11 tests passed. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_commission_chain_iter22.py
